description: User reads the initial task instructions on the screen.
An 'Open' button appears at the bottom of the instruction screen.
User clicks the 'Open' button to proceed to the website.
The page navigates to the Google homepage.
User clicks in the top right area of the Google page, likely to return to instructions.
The screen returns to the instruction overlay.
User reads updated instructions on the screen.
User clicks in the top right corner of the instruction screen to proceed.
The page navigates to Google search results for 'skyscanner'.
User clicks in the bottom right area of the search results page, likely to return to instructions.
The screen returns to the instruction overlay.
